title: SmashMC Cobblemon
description: The official modpack for SmashMC's Cobblemon Gold! Includes many Performance-Improving Mods, Quality of Life Mods, and Immersion Mods!
body:
### SmashMC Cobblemon
This is the official modpack for the SmashMC Cobblemon Server!

This modpack includes:
- **Cobblemon** - The best Pokemon mod around!
- **All Pokemon** - Every single Pokemon can be found inside this modpack on the SmashMC Server!
- **Performance-Enhancement Mods** - To help increase your FPS without ruining your experience!
- **Quality of Life Tweaks** - to make your life easier!
- **Immersion Mods** - to add a bit more depth to the game!

 ![!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dd6919e984cfcdd5b2d7f7a4e4f8e601f7d1c66.png)


<details>
<summary>Server Features</summary>

- All Pokemon Models
- Accessible Legendaries
- Battle Factory
- Gyms
- Bingo
- Battle Pass
- PokeHunts
- GTS
- WonderTrade
- Breeding
- Daycare
- Tournaments
- Events
- Restocking Chest Loot
- Custom Camos for all Pokemon
- Dex Rewards
- Daily Rewards
- Playtime Rewards
- And more!

</details>
